title: medicago tornata var. aculeata
intro: Medicago tornata var. aculeata, also known as prickly medick or prickly lucerne, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Medicago tornata var. aculeata include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
